name: Social Media Hero Banner
description: Wide 16:9 hero image for website banners, landing pages, or social covers. Can be text-to-image or image-to-image with product.
prompt_template: {style} hero banner, {subject}, {background}, {mood} color palette. Clean negative space on the {negative_space_side} for text overlay. {lighting} lighting. Professional advertising photography. Aspect ratio 16:9.

placeholders.subject: person drinking from a shaker bottle at gym

example_prompt: Modern lifestyle hero banner, person drinking from a shaker bottle at gym, soft gradient studio backdrop, energetic blue and orange color palette. Clean negative space on the left for text overlay. Dramatic side-light lighting. Professional advertising photography. Aspect ratio 16:9.
tips: Request negative space explicitly — AI often fills the frame
Specify which side needs to stay empty for UI text/buttons
Use 'professional advertising photography' for sharper composition
2K is usually enough for web; 4K for retina displays
If using a product, do image-to-image and place the product in the negative space
